summary: Comprehensive testing of auth refactor with bcrypt, persistent sessions, leaderboard v2 with period filters, push notifications, and congrats card quick links. All 18 backend tests passed. Frontend login, leaderboard page with period tabs, and congrats card with quick links all working correctly.

frontend_tests.login_flow: PASSED - Email/password filled, Log In clicked, redirected to /home
frontend_tests.leaderboard_period_tabs: PASSED - This Week, This Month, All Time tabs visible
frontend_tests.leaderboard_level_tabs: PASSED - My Team, My Org, Global tabs visible
frontend_tests.leaderboard_categories: PASSED - Total, Digital Cards, Reviews, Cards Sent, Emails, SMS, Calls, Tasks Done
frontend_tests.congrats_card_page: PASSED - Card loads with salesman info
frontend_tests.congrats_quick_links: PASSED - My Card, My Page, Showcase, Links buttons visible
frontend_tests.congrats_review_text: PASSED - Shows 'Leave an online review' not 'Leave a Google review'

verified_features: Login with bcrypt hashed passwords - POST /api/auth/login verifies plain-text password against bcrypt hash
Auto-upgrade legacy plain-text passwords to bcrypt on successful login
Persistent session via imos_session cookie (10-year expiry)
Session restoration via GET /api/auth/me from cookie
Logout clears session cookie via POST /api/auth/logout
Change password validates current password against bcrypt hash
Leaderboard v2 store level with period parameter (week/month/all)
Leaderboard v2 org level with period parameter
Leaderboard v2 global level with period parameter
Push subscription endpoint accepts Web Push subscription objects
VAPID public key endpoint returns configured key
Congrats card quick links: My Card, My Page, Showcase, Links
Congrats card review text says 'Leave an online review' after review
Push notification milestone check fires on event creation (via _quick_milestone_check in contact_events.py and messages.py)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auth refactor with bcrypt is complete - all 123 users have bcrypt hashed passwords. Login works, persistent sessions via cookie work. Leaderboard v2 at /admin/leaderboard has period-based filters (This Week, This Month, All Time) and level tabs (My Team, My Org, Global). Congrats card page shows quick links row and 'Leave an online review' text. Push notifications infrastructure exists with VAPID keys configured.

mocked_apis.Push Notifications: VAPID keys configured but no real push sent in tests
